content_body: Our family loved everything about this house and we had a wonderful time. It is such a beautiful and well-taken care of house with plenty of coices of games and other activities to do. We enjoyed going to the shopping area near the train depot here in BLue Ridge. We also enjoyed seeing Ruby Falls and Rock City in Tennessee. Following that, we went to Blanche Manot in Copperhill, Tennessee to go horseback riding in the mountains. It has been an incredible trip and staying in this cabin made it even more beautiful! Thank you!
title: Incredible Trip! So Much To Do!
